title: gymnadenia diphylla
intro: Gymnadenia diphylla, also known as the lesser twayblade, is a species of orchid native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Gymnadenia diphylla are typically made by infusing the roots or leaves in water or oil, and are often used in the form of teas, tinctures, or ointments.
